reviews.review_title: BEST FAN GAME EVER (in my opinion)
reviews.review_description: This is the best tan game because u get every cosmetic (not stick and not admin badge I thing)you get finger painter and illustrator (finger painter you have to get like 200 likes on the video or short) (illustrator u have to get like 1000 or 2000 likes to get illustrator and in the discord when u have one of these items it will pop up as (finger painter) or illustrator it will pop up as (illustrator) also servers do work but it is a bit slow so if u wanna donate money to the game it will help and servers will get better and better but overall the game is the best fan game ever (in my opinion) other people will believe me some might not
